# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionCutoffFreqMin property

Lowpass cutoff frequency at the minimum distance (closest to the source). Higher values mean less filtering when nearby — recommended to keep close to 20 000 Hz.

```csharp
public int AirAbsorptionCutoffFreqMin { get; set; }
```
